handoff.salientSummary: cargo tauri dev now starts the @proj-airi/stage-tauri Vite dev server on port 1420, builds/runs the Rust Tauri process, and displays the main window on pure Wayland. The visible first screen is a minimal AIRI Tauri shell that says 'Tauri stage is running'.
handoff.whatWasImplemented: Added apps/stage-tauri/package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, env.d.ts, index.html, and a minimal Vue renderer under apps/stage-tauri/src/. The package exposes dev/build/typecheck scripts; dev binds Vite to 127.0.0.1:1420 with strictPort. Updated tauri.conf.json frontendDist to ./dist for the current app-root layout, kept the launch window opaque/decorated until the later transparent-main-window feature, and extended init.sh to validate frontend files. Added apps/stage-tauri/.cargo/config.toml with WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 to avoid WebKitGTK 2.52 Wayland/Hyprland GDK protocol crashes.
handoff.whatWasLeftUndone: The renderer is intentionally a minimal launch shell. Full Vue 3 AIRI renderer migration, Tauri eventa context bootstrapping in the production renderer, and the default character rendering page are tracked by main-window-vue-render and renderer-migration features. Transparent undecorated behavior is deferred to transparent-main-window.

commandsRun.observation: RED check before implementation reported: No projects matched the filters in /home/vi/anima.
After implementation Vite reported ready on http://127.0.0.1:1420/ before the timeout stopped it.
After adding the WebKitGTK Wayland workaround, plain cargo tauri dev reported Vite ready in 208 ms, finished the Rust dev build, ran target/debug/airi-tauri, and stayed alive until timeout.
User confirmed the Tauri window displayed: 'Tauri stage is running'.
vue-tsc and vite build passed; dist/index.html and JS/CSS assets were produced.
Updated init script validated Rust and frontend scaffold files and ran cargo check.
Rust build passed with the five known placeholder dead-code warnings.

interactiveChecks.result: User confirmed the main window appeared and showed the expected launch shell text.

tests.coverage: Launch feature is covered by Vite/typecheck/build, app-local init, cargo build, bounded cargo tauri dev, and user visual confirmation.

discoveredIssues.description: WebKitGTK 2.52 on Wayland/Hyprland crashed with 'Error 71 (Protocol error) dispatching to Wayland display' until WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 was applied through Cargo config.
The main window is now opaque and decorated for launch stability. Restoring transparent/undecorated behavior belongs to the pending transparent-main-window feature.
MCP Serena/jcodemunch tools required by AGENTS.md were unavailable, so native tooling fallback was used and recorded.

deviations.whatIDidInstead: Used native rg/sed/git/apply_patch/pnpm/cargo tooling, bounded launch commands, and user visual confirmation.
deviations.why: The MCP tools named by AGENTS.md were not exposed in the current tool list.
